name: engineering-calculation-system
description: Codex plugin wrapper for the Engineering Calculation System skill pack.

interface.shortDescription: Lifecycle workflow for auditable engineering calculators.
interface.longDescription: Packages the Engineering Calculation System skill pack for Codex, including lifecycle routing, reference acquisition, source-backed formula extraction, implementation handoff, reusable calculation modules, reports, verification, and deployable web calculation system guidance.
defaultPrompt: Build a traceable engineering calculation web app.
Assess whether my engineering references are sufficient.
